# Family Wealth Protection Advisory Pty Ltd (FWP Advisory)

> Strategy-led asset protection and succession advisory for Australian business owners, families, and asset holders. FWP Advisory identifies the risks, designs a written strategy, and coordinates implementation with specialist legal professionals. Strategic advisors, not lawyers. General information only — not legal or financial advice.

## Services
- Asset Protection Strategy — reduce exposure to claims, creditors, and legal risk.
- Succession Planning — control where assets are intended to go.
- Trust & Entity Restructuring — review structures that may no longer suit your position.
- Risk Review & Strategy — identify hidden risks before they become problems.
- Supporting services: accounting & tax, bookkeeping, business advisory, mortgage broking, personal insurance, company secretarial & ASIC compliance.

## Process
1. Discovery Meeting — identify where assets may be exposed and clarify intentions.
2. Personalised Strategy Paper — plain-English explanation of risks and recommended pathway.
3. Strategy Presentation Meeting — review the strategy and decide whether to implement.

## Key pages
- Home: /
- Services: /services
- About: /about
- Process: /process
- Resources: /resources
- Contact: /contact
- Free Guide (The Guide to Protecting Family Wealth): /guide

## Who it is for
Business owners, professionals, investors, families with trusts or entities, blended families, and people who want greater control over how assets are structured and passed on.
